description: Read one AGS4 group as a typed table — born-typed columns plus content-addressed _id/_parent_id keys
comment: Local / http(s):// / s3:// (with LOAD httpfs); consumes a sibling .ags.idx for a fast single-group slice

description: Read one AGS4 group as a typed table from an inline AGS4 string
comment: No filesystem — the input is a VARCHAR (already UTF-8)

description: List the groups in an AGS4 file with row and heading counts
The per-heading schema of an AGS4 file, enriched with dictionary KEY status
comment: Returns (group, heading, unit, ags_type, sql_type, status, is_key, ordinal)

description: The embedded standard AGS dictionary as a table
comment: Returns (group, heading, status, ags_type, unit, description)

description: The AGS group parent-child (KEY) graph that _parent_id follows
Emit CREATE-TABLE DDL to materialise every AGS4 group into an indexed, queryable store
comment: Returns (seq, stmt) — run the statements to get keyed tables
example: SELECT stmt FROM load_ags('site.ags') ORDER BY seq;
